differential_diagnoses: Leptomeningeal recurrence of diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
next_steps: Send CSF for specific arboviral PCR panel (Powassan, West Nile virus, Eastern Equine encephalitis)
Perform high-volume CSF sampling for repeat cytology and repeat flow cytometry to rule out lymphoma
Obtain serum and CSF paraneoplastic autoantibody panel
Send CSF for HHV-6 and JC virus PCR
Perform brain biopsy (stereotactic) if infectious and cytological studies remain nondiagnostic to rule out lymphoma or rare CNS infection
Continue supportive care including neurocritical monitoring for bulbar dysfunction
